1.name: The Grand Elm Ballroom
1.subtitle: Crystal chandeliers, sprung dance floor, and a dedicated bridal suite.
1.description: A timeless ballroom with fourteen-foot ceilings, warm oak floors, and floor-to-ceiling windows at sunset. Perfect for receptions that need a dramatic first dance and flexible seating layouts. Our team handles room flips and vendor load-in coordination.

policies.title: Load-in & timing
policies.body: Vendor access from 8:00 AM; events end by midnight with a 1-hour breakdown window.

policies.title: Catering
policies.body: Choose from our preferred list or bring a licensed caterer with certificate of insurance.

policies.title: Decorations
policies.body: Open flame and confetti require approval; ceiling installations must use venue rigging points only.

2.name: Cypress Garden Estate
2.subtitle: Outdoor ceremony lawn, covered pavilion, and string-light courtyard.
2.description: Exchange vows under ancient oaks, then celebrate in a climate-controlled pavilion steps away. The estate includes a prep cottage, fire pits for cool evenings, and optional tent add-ons for larger guest counts.

policies.title: Weather
policies.body: Rain plan included with pavilion; tent quotes available 90 days out.

policies.title: Noise
policies.body: Amplified music outdoors ends by 10:00 PM per county ordinance.

3.name: Foundry Hall
3.subtitle: Exposed brick, steel beams, and a mezzanine for brand activations.
3.description: Raw industrial character with polished concrete floors and plenty of power for productions. Brands love the mezzanine for VIP lounges; planners love the open floorplate for runway shows and seated dinners alike.

policies.title: Production
policies.body: Rigging and pyro require advance walkthrough with venue technical director.

4.name: Skyline Rooftop 12
4.subtitle: Panoramic skyline views with retractable glass walls.
4.description: An intimate rooftop built for sunset cocktails and executive dinners. Climate-controlled interior flows to an open terrace—ideal for investor gatherings and upscale private parties.

policies.title: Capacity
policies.body: Terrace capacity is weather-dependent; interior holds full guest count in inclement weather.

5.name: Red Barn Gathering
5.subtitle: Rustic charm with modern restrooms and climate-controlled dining hall.
5.description: Authentic barn beams paired with updated amenities. Weekend packages include rehearsal hour options and s’mores stations at the fire pit.

policies.title: Alcohol
policies.body: TABC-licensed bartenders required; venue can coordinate.

6.name: North Loop Gallery
6.subtitle: White-box gallery with track lighting and modular walls.
6.description: Minimalist walls and professional lighting make this space a favorite for creative workshops, pop-up retail, and intimate seated dinners with an art-forward backdrop.

policies.title: Installations
policies.body: Wall-mounted work requires patch & paint fee schedule.

7.name: Riverstone Boathouse
7.subtitle: Dock access, sunset deck, and nautical lounge interior.
7.description: Water views from every angle. Great for boutique corporate retreats and rehearsal dinners with optional boat arrival photos.

policies.title: Water safety
policies.body: Dock use requires waiver; life jackets on site for demos only.

8.name: Studio 9 Loft
8.subtitle: Bright creative loft with kitchen island and Sonos zones.
8.description: A flexible downtown loft for team offsites, podcast tapings, and small celebrations. Natural light until mid-afternoon; blackout shades available.

policies.title: Building
policies.body: Load-in via freight elevator; quiet hours after 10 PM.
